hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("(^|[;&|] *)(rtk )?git commit")' > /dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; out=$(cd /Users/chema/Code/Chemaclass/chemaclass.com && zola build --output-dir /tmp/zola-precommit-gate --force 2>&1) || { printf '%s\n' "$out" | tail -5 >&2; echo 'zola build failed; fix errors before committing' >&2; exit 2; }

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *git\ commit*|*gh\ pr*) if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -q '—'; then echo 'Em dash (U+2014) is forbidden in commit/PR text (see .claude/rules/no-em-dash.md)' >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */content/*.md|*/static/slides/*.md) if grep -n -e '—' -e '–' "$f" >&2; then echo "Em dash (U+2014) and en dash (U+2013) are forbidden; replace them (see .claude/rules/no-em-dash.md)" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
